title: Notification No.65/2008-Cus(NT), dated 02.06.2008
text: Notification No. 65 / 2008-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 2nd June, 2008 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, (Preventive), New Custom House, Ballard Pier, Mumbai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on (i) the Commissioner of Customs, CSI Airport, Sahar, Mumbai; and (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, IGI Airport, New Delhi for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to Shri Liu Kang Chuan (In Judicial Custody) and Others issued vide, F.No. DRI/BZU/C/INV-14/2006-07/5190-5195 dated the 5th July, 2007, by the Additional Director General, Directorate General of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai Zonal Unit, Mumbai. [F.No. 437/67/2007-Cus.IV] (Aseem Kumar) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
